ValidationRule.description: Annulment Date mandatory for Annuled Status
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, OR((ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Status__c ) && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Annulled')&& ISNULL( Insolvency_Annulled_Date__c )), (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c , 'Annulled')&& ISCHANGED( Insolvency_Annulled_Date__c )&& ISNULL(Insolvency_Annulled_Date__c )), false))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Annulement Date is mandatory as Insolvency Status moved to Annulled
